message:
fix: TTL-aware session counting, recorder crash recovery, and contract status helpers

session_store: pass now_ms to key_count/is_empty so they call
dbsize(now_ms) accounting for expired keys instead of reporting stale
counts.

recorder_storage: add recover_checkpoints_from_scan filtering out
checkpoints beyond recovered log head. Refactor open path to use
scan-based recovery when persisted state is stale.

vendored_async_contracts: add standard_surface_contract_counts() and
standard_surface_status() test helpers for audit report validation.
Add proptest coverage for SurfaceContractStatus fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
